description: Move shipped onboarding v2 files (PR #59) into v2/ subdirectory convention per CLAUDE.md V2 Rule. Validates the convention scales to a multi-screen feature before applying to Training Plan v2.

transitions.note: Enhancement work type — skipped Research, PRD, UX. Parent feature: onboarding (PR #59, shipped 2026-04-06). Starting at Phase 2 (Tasks).

State.json reconciliation: PR #63 (2026-04-09 file-move-only enhancement) shipped without state.json phase advancement. Reconciled retroactively to match shipped reality. Closes iOS audit finding H-2.

tasks.note: Tasks were the file-move plan; executed within the single PR #63 commit.

implementation.note: Single commit on feature branch shipped 8 file moves + pbxproj surgery + HISTORICAL annotations.

testing.reason: No functional changes — existing onboarding tests cover behavior. Build verified via xcodebuild.

documentation.note: V2 Rule documented in CLAUDE.md and validated by this multi-screen application.

snapshot.next_action_when_resumed: Complete tasks phase; case_study link resolved by v7.7 T10 (stub case study created during v7.7)

case_study_exempt_reason: Enhancement work_type — retroactive v2/ subdirectory move shipped via PR #63 (2026-04-09). No functional changes (file move + project.pbxproj surgery only). Existing onboarding-v2-auth-flow case study + onboarding case study cover the user-facing surface.

complete.note: State reconciliation 2026-05-08 via PR-T1-H2 (iOS audit finding H-2). Original PR #63 shipped 2026-04-09; state.json was never advanced past phases.tasks=in_progress.

tasks.note: Tasks phase opened retroactively after PR #63 merged; closed via PR-T1-H2 reconciliation (iOS audit finding H-2).
